column1: Source: Statistics Canada, Small Business and Special Surveys Division: Federal Jurisdiction Workplace Survey 2004, Question 17
Note: Employer survey - Data in this survey reflects the employer's perspective.
The number of employees working in a company who are being offered a benefit is not necessarily equal to the number of employees using or receiving that benefit.
